title: selaginella calosticha
intro: Selaginella calosticha is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as spikemoss or spike moss, which is a type of non-vascular, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. In herbal preparations, Selaginella calosticha is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be combined with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or tonic.
